"https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-12478"}], "notes": [{"category": "general", "text": "The fix for CVE-2026-0716 (commit 6ff7ef0, libsoup 3.6.6) placed the integer overflow guard inside the if (masked) block, leaving unmasked server-to-client frames unprotected.
